/usr/bin/ar qc libsched_ue_context.a CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/logical_channel_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ta_management_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_channel_state_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_link_adaptation_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_drx_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_cell_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sched_ue_context.dir/ue_cell.cpp.o ../cell/CMakeFiles/sched_cell.dir/vrb_alloc.cpp.o ../cell/CMakeFiles/sched_cell.dir/resource_block_group.cpp.o ../cell/CMakeFiles/sched_cell.dir/resource_grid.cpp.o ../cell/CMakeFiles/sched_cell.dir/scheduler_prb.cpp.o ../cell/CMakeFiles/sched_cell.dir/cell_harq_manager.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsched_ue_context.a
